visuals.title: Binary Search Process Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Binary Search Process Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Collection Algorithms and Arrays</text>

  <!-- Array Structure -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="320" height="40" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- Array Elements -->
  <rect x="60" y="65" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="105" y="65" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="150" y="65" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="195" y="65" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="240" y="65" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="285" y="65" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="330" y="65" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>

  <!-- Array Labels -->
  <text x="80" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Item 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="125" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Item 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="170" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Item 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="215" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Item 4
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="260" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Item 5
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="305" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Item 6
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="350" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Item 7
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Algorithm Boxes -->
  <rect x="50" y="130" width="150" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="125" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Sort Algorithm
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="220" y="130" width="150" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="295" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Search Algorithm
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrows -->
  <path d="M125 105 L125 125" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M295 105 L295 125" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Result Boxes -->
  <rect x="50" y="200" width="320" height="40" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>

  <!-- Sorted Array -->
  <rect x="60" y="205" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="105" y="205" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="150" y="205" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="195" y="205" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="240" y="205" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="285" y="205" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="330" y="205" width="40" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>

  <!-- Sorted Labels -->
  <text x="80" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="125" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="170" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    C
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="215" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    D
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="260" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    E
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="305" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    F
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="350" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    G
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Found Element Highlight -->
  <rect x="240" y="205" width="40" height="30" fill="#FF5722" rx="3" stroke="#E64A19" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    E
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Result Labels -->
  <text x="210" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Sorted Array with Found Element
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>

nodes.label: If target < mid → search left half
If target > mid → search right half
If not found → return negative value
